arts.ttl: Financial police seize €75 million from Elkann brothers and Juventus president Ferrero
arts.sum: The Investigating Judge of the Turin Prosecutor’s Office has ordered the seizure, carried out by the Financial Police, of financial assets, movable and immovable property worth €74.8 million from brothers John, Lapo and Ginevra Elkann, as well as Juventus President Gianluca Ferrero (longtime accountant for the Agnelli/Elkann family) and Urs Robert Von Grunigen (notary of Marella Agnelli) for “tax fraud” and “fraud against the State.” Calcio e Finanza report:“As part of the criminal proceedings against Gianluca Ferrero, Urs Robert Von Grünigen and brothers John Philip, Lapo Edovard and Ginevra Elkann, the Preliminary Investigations Judge has issued – at the request The post Financial police seize €75 million from Elkann brothers and Juventus president Ferrero appeared first on FootItalia.com.
